checks.note: Return type is dict[str, Any] but the returned dict has a known, fixed shape matching the existing TargetEntry TypedDict (keys: 'target' and 'checks'). The return type should be TargetEntry to express the actual data shape.

annotations.message: Return type dict[str, Any] should be TargetEntry — the returned dict always has 'target' (SymbolTarget) and 'checks' (list) keys matching the existing TypedDict.

checks.note: Returns dict[str, Any] when the codebase already defines TargetEntry TypedDict with the exact same shape (target + checks). Using the existing structured type would make the contract explicit.

annotations.message: Return type should use the existing TargetEntry TypedDict instead of dict[str, Any].
